Products
SHL Products
Get the ultimate view of potential with SHL’s unmatched portfolio of assessments and interview technology.
Speak With Our Team
Products That Answer All Your People Questions
Get the precise people answers you need with SHL’s products, including pioneering personality tests, behavioral and skills assessments, coding and language simulations, 360° feedback, AI-powered video interviews, and virtual assessment and development centers.
Products for Every Stage of the Talent Experience
SHL products have been carefully designed to produce highly reusable data and to enhance all stages of the talent experience, from scaling early-stage candidate screening to uncovering critical, data-driven insights into future employee development.
Products That Delight All Your People
We combine multimedia-rich experiences with realistic, scalable simulations and assessments to attract and engage candidates on a deeper level than ever before, and to provide your employees with valuable insights that drive performance and retention.
